title: Protocol for ethnographic research
author: InterGEDI
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A protocol was designed by InterGedi research members in order to carry out ethnographic studies focusing on contextual information about the international research projects participating in the Horizon2020 framework.
steps_raw: A protocol was designed by InterGedi research members in order to carry out ethnographic studies focusing on contextual information about the international research projects participating in the Horizon2020 framework.
